source: Generated from sprite filenames in Heads/Torsos/Wings/Legs

parts.description: A weathered brow of Marshborn make, Prime-patterned around fen motifs; keeps calm under pressure, and it is built for steady, all-round dueling.
An uncanny visage of Marshborn make, Rugged-patterned around marsh motifs; sniffs out critical strikes, and it is built for steady, all-round dueling.
A sharp-eyed profile of Marshborn make, Swift-patterned around reed motifs; reads the fight before it happens, and it is built for steady, all-round dueling.
